body:
## Sprint
- Sprint ID: `S10-gui-operator-tools-v1`
- Objective: Put the full operator workflow inside the GUI (preflight, PR protocol, gates, diff review, out-of-sync detection/repair, closeout assistant) with operator-grade evidence and hard stops.

## Scope
- Whitelist: `apps/**`, `src/**`, `scripts/**`, `docs/backlog/**`, `docs/sprints/README.md`, `docs/sprints/S10/**`, `/tmp/**`
- Budgets used:
  - Max net new lines in any single existing file: `120`
  - Max total LOC in touched file: `1200`
  - Max function length: `80`
  - Max hooks/useEffect per touched file: `1`

## AT Checklist
- [x] AT-S10-01
- [x] AT-S10-02
- [x] AT-S10-03

## Evidence Paths
- `docs/sprints/S10/evidence/closeout_bundle/run_20260304_182532/`
- `docs/sprints/S10/evidence/at/`
- `docs/sprints/S10/evidence/tools/`
- `/tmp/promptops/S10/run_20260304_182532/`
- `/tmp/promptops/S10/tools/S10_tool_demo_summary.json`

## Stoplight Markers Used
- `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`
- `HARD STOP`
- `PROMPTOPS_REPO`
- `OUT_OF_SYNC`
